prompt: I was working on the payments epic yesterday and got through story-1 and half of story-2. The session context in ohno should have details. Continue where I left off in auto mode.

assertions.text: Calls get_session_context() to retrieve previous session state
Looks for handoff notes or in-progress tasks from previous session
Does not re-execute already completed tasks
References auto mode behavior (skip task and story checkpoints, pause at epic boundary)
Resumes from the specific in-progress task
